allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING = "utf-8"; Push-Location backend; py -X utf8 app.py; Pop-Location)

PowerShell($src = "frontend\\node_modules\\three\\examples\\jsm\\libs\\basis"; $dst = "frontend\\public\\basis"; if \(Test-Path $src\) { Copy-Item $src $dst -Recurse -Force; "已复制 basis 文件夹"; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 1\)}} } else { "❌ 源目录不存在: $src" })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Write-Output "== 检查 MySQL 是否已安装 =="; & mysql --version; Write-Output "== 检查 MySQL 安装目录 =="; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\MySQL' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "== 检查 DBeaver =="; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\DBeaver' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "== 当前用户 Downloads 目录 =="; $dl="$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads"; Write-Output $dl; Test-Path $dl; Write-Output "== 桌面路径 =="; [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\))
